query:
INSERT INTO submissions (
            id,
            assignment_id,
            cmsx_group_id,
            cmsx_assignment_id,
            cmsx_assignment_name,
            netids_raw,
            netids_json,
            received_at,
            raw_metadata
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
